properties.name: App
properties.description: Top-level layout host: boots the project registry, manages WebSocket subscriptions, and composes all child components into the app chrome.

properties.name: Sidebar
properties.description: Left-rail panel displaying the board tree grouped by kind, with per-board sync-status dots and skill action buttons. Each board item shows displayName (the relatedId, e.g. "UC-004") as the primary label and, when available, the graph-resolved label (UseCase.name or BusinessProcess.name) as a secondary subtitle below it.

properties.name: Canvas Host
properties.description: Wraps the Excalidraw editor, loads board scene from the store, debounces edits back to the server, and renders diff-overlay highlights on regeneration.

properties.name: Status Bar
properties.description: Footer widget showing the selected board sync state, last-generated timestamp, and quick-action buttons for regenerate / sync-to-graph.

properties.name: Run Panel
properties.description: Floating overlay listing active and recent skill runs with phase icons, elapsed time, and batch progress.

properties.name: Snapshot Browser
properties.description: Right-rail panel listing board snapshots with relative timestamps and a diff-view toggle for comparing snapshot state against live canvas.

properties.name: Project Picker
properties.description: Inline header dropdown/modal for switching the active project, showing project name, path, and last-active timestamp.

properties.name: Unregistered Banner
properties.description: Dismissible banner shown when the server cwd project is not registered in the project registry, prompting the user to run /nacl-init.

properties.name: Empty Projects Placeholder
properties.description: Canvas-area placeholder rendered when the project registry is empty.

properties.name: Regen Confirm Dialog
properties.description: Modal dialog triggered when the analyst initiates regeneration on a dirty board.
